"'''A Summer's Dream'''" was a short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in [[Star Wars Tales 5|''Star Wars Tales'' 5]] and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 2]]'' and [[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 2|''Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Volume 2'']].

==Plot summary==
On [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the city of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], the son of the counselor to [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ars Veruna/Legends|Veruna]], [[Ian Lago]], arranges to meet with Princess [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. After getting to know her better, as opposed to her public figure, he falls in love with her. But when his father finds out that his son is hanging out with the political competition, he tries to put a stop to the relationship. At the same time, King Veruna abdicates and Amidala is elected [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of Naboo. She has to devote her time to her people now, and has no time for a boy such as Ian. Heartbroken, and with his father out of a job, he leaves Naboo and never returns. Ian vanishes into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], never seen nor heard from again.

==Continuity==
Events from ''A Summer's Dream'' were later included in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']].
